message:
fix: prevent game cards from swallowing keyboard input in dialogs (#3260)

Game card components registered global keydown handlers that called
preventDefault() on WASD and other character keys without checking if
the user was typing in an input field. This blocked typing 's' (and
other letters) in the Add Cards search dialog and any other input.

Added input/textarea/contentEditable target guard to all 13 affected
keyboard handlers so game controls only activate when focus is not
in a text field.

Signed-off-by: andy anderson <andy@andys-MacBook-Pro.local>
Co-authored-by: andy anderson <andy@andys-MacBook-Pro.local>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
